offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports for maintenance activities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try Template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
